title: Excitonic Condensation in an Asymmetric Electron-Hole Biwire
summary: We study a mass-asymmetric one-dimensional electron-hole biwire system at zero temperature using the diffusion quantum Monte Carlo method. Pair correlation functions and condensate fraction are obtained over a wide range of carrier densities $r_{\rm s}$ and interwire separations $d$, allowing us to construct the phase diagram. We identify regimes corresponding to a two-component electron-hole plasma, an excitonic fluid with quasicondensation, and a Wigner-correlated phase at various densities. Owing to reduced dimensionality, strong electron-hole correlations favor excitonic quasicondensation even in the high-density limit, persisting down to $r_{\rm s} = 0.3$ a.u. These results provide a microscopic characterization of correlation-driven phases in electron-hole systems in one dimension.

AI.tldr: 本文利用扩散量子蒙特卡洛方法研究了一维非对称电子-空穴双线系统在零温下的相图，发现即使在高密度极限下也能存在激子准凝聚态。
AI.motivation: 探索一维电子-空穴系统中质量不对称性对关联驱动相（如激子凝聚、维格纳关联相）的影响，特别是在高密度极限下的行为。
AI.method: 使用扩散量子蒙特卡洛（DMC）方法计算不同载流子密度和线间距下的对关联函数和凝聚体分数，构建相图。
AI.result: 识别出三种相：双组分电子-空穴等离子体、具有准凝聚的激子流体、维格纳关联相；激子准凝聚可延伸至极高的密度（r_s=0.3 a.u.）。
AI.conclusion: 由于维度降低，强电子-空穴关联抑制了高密度下的退耦合效应，维持激子准凝聚态的存在，为一维电子-空穴系统中的关联驱动相提供了微观表征。

title: Kohn--Luttinger Superconductivity in Flat Chern Bands
summary: Recent observations of superconductivity near correlated topological phases in flat bands suggest a facile link between flat-band geometry and electron pairing. In this work, we reveal a geometry-driven Kohn--Luttinger mechanism in which Landau-level-like form factors align the attractive lobe of the RPA-screened Coulomb interaction with the form-factor peak, generating an anomalously strong attractive channel near local band extrema. Using the Skyrmion lattice model as a minimal realization, we show that for spin-unpolarized pairing the form-factor magnitude enforces an emergent momentum-space translational symmetry and selects an extended-$s$ instability concentrated at small Fermi pockets, while for spin-polarized pairing the form-factor phase drives chiral $p$- and $f$-wave order without invoking spin fluctuations. The band-extrema enhancement persists in higher Landau-level analogs and survives finite-temperature screening and Berezinskii--Kosterlitz--Thouless phase fluctuations. Our work establishes quantum geometry as a key organizing principle for unconventional pairing in flat Chern bands.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了平带中量子几何驱动的Kohn-Luttinger超导机制，发现朗道能级类形状因子能在局域带极值附近产生异常强的有效吸引通道，并通过斯格明子晶格模型展示了自旋极化与非极化配对的不同序参量行为。
AI.motivation: 平带系统中超导与拓扑相共存的现象暗示平带几何与电子配对之间存在深层联系，但具体机制尚不明确。作者试图揭示几何如何直接驱动超导配对，而不依赖传统的声子或自旋涨落机制。
AI.method: 基于RPA屏蔽库伦相互作用，结合形状因子分析，建立几何驱动的Kohn-Luttinger理论框架。以斯格明子晶格模型作为最小实现，分别讨论自旋非极化（s波）和自旋极化（chiral p/f波）两种配对情况。
AI.result: 1) 形状因子幅度迫使自旋非极化配对出现动量空间平移对称性，选择扩展s波集中在费米小口袋；2) 形状因子相位驱动自旋极化配对出现手性p波和f波序；3) 带极值增强效应在更高朗道能级类似物中也存在，并能在有限温度和BKT涨落下存活。
AI.conclusion: 量子几何是平带Chern带中非传统配对的关键组织原则，该机制为理解平带超导提供了新的统一视角。

title: Room-temperature tuning and probing of Fermi polarons in atomically thin semiconductors on a plasmonic metasurface
summary: The Fermi polaron, arising from interactions between a mobile impurity and a degenerate Fermi sea, is a many-body quasiparticle that provides a sensitive probe of strongly correlated electronic phases in atomically thin semiconductors. In doped transition-metal dichalcogenides, the attractive and repulsive polaron branches are well established in monolayers. However, extending active control and quantitative, branch-resolved probing to stacked geometries has remained elusive because spectral quenching and weak optical contrast restrict access to Fermi polaron signatures. Here, we integrate electron-doped WS$_2$ flakes from monolayer to quadrilayer with a strain-tunable plasmonic metasurface, enabling high-contrast scattering readout at room temperature through coupling between Fermi polaron resonances and surface plasmons. This platform enables quantitative extraction of polaron branch spectral weights and coupling strengths across different layer numbers. We uncover a systematic thickness dependence of the spectral-weight distribution and demonstrate continuous and fully reversible spectral-weight transfer between attractive and repulsive branches in bilayers and quadrilayers, with near-complete transfer achieved in bilayers. By identifying layer number and strain as complementary control parameters for Fermi polarons, our results establish metasurface-enabled scattering spectroscopy as a practical route to resolve and manipulate many-body resonances in stacked van der Waals semiconductors, bridging idealized monolayer polaron physics and device-relevant architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文通过将电子掺杂的WS₂薄片（从单层到四层）与应变可调等离激元超表面集成，在室温下实现了费米极化子分支的高对比度散射读出，揭示了极化子谱权重的系统厚度依赖性，并实现了双层和四层中吸引和排斥分支之间连续可逆的谱权重转移。
AI.motivation: 将费米极化子的主动控制和分支分辨探测从单层扩展到堆叠几何结构（多层）一直难以实现，因为光谱猝灭和弱光学对比度限制了费米极化子特征的获取。
AI.method: 将电子掺杂的WS₂薄片（单层到四层）与应变可调等离激元超表面集成，通过费米极化子共振与表面等离激元之间的耦合，实现室温下高对比度散射读出，定量提取不同层数下的极化子分支谱权重和耦合强度。
AI.result: 发现了极化子谱权重分布的系统厚度依赖性，在双层和四层中实现了吸引和排斥分支之间连续且完全可逆的谱权重转移，其中双层实现了近乎完全的转移。
AI.conclusion: 层数和应变可作为费米极化子的互补控制参数，超表面增强散射光谱学为解决和操控堆叠范德华半导体中的多体共振提供了实用途径，弥合了理想单层极化子物理与器件相关架构之间的差距。

title: Vortex-Beam-Driven Dirac Materials: Impurity and Polarization Effects on Light-Induced Vortex and Edge States
summary: We study impurity scattering and polarization detuning in finite-size vortex-light-beam-driven massive Dirac systems. In finite geometries, circularly polarized vortex light opens a dynamical gap where topological edge states coexist with photoinduced multiply quantized vortex states. We analyze how finite-size effects, vorticity, and effective particle-hole symmetry manifest in the quasienergy spectrum, real-space states, and local density of states. We show that angular-momentum mixing due to localized impurities and impurity clusters reshape vortex states, while when produced by circular polarization, it leads to a gradual filling of the dynamical gap with bulk-derived states. Our results indicate that both vortex and edge signatures remain observable in the presence of impurities and realistic polarization deviations, providing guidance for experimental realizations.

AI.tldr: 研究了有限尺寸涡旋光束驱动的具有质量狄拉克系统中的杂质散射和偏振失谐，发现涡旋和边缘态特征在杂质和偏振偏差下仍可观测。
AI.motivation: 探索在有限几何结构中，涡旋光束驱动的狄拉克系统中杂质散射和偏振失谐如何影响拓扑边缘态和涡旋态，为实验实现提供理论指导。
AI.method: 通过理论分析有限尺寸效应、涡旋性、有效粒子-空穴对称性，计算准能量谱、实空间态和局域态密度；研究局域杂质和杂质团簇引起的角动量混合效应。
AI.result: 圆偏振涡旋光打开动力学能隙，其中拓扑边缘态与光致多重量化涡旋态共存；杂质引起的角动量混合重塑涡旋态，并逐渐填充动力学能隙；涡旋和边缘特征在杂质和偏振偏差下仍可观察到。
AI.conclusion: 涡旋态和边缘态在存在杂质和实际偏振偏差时仍保持可观测性，为实验实现提供了重要指导。

title: Chiral Phonons Enable Ultrafast Magnetization Switching via Magnetoelastic Coupling
summary: Phonons are desirable for current-free energy-efficient spin manipulation and harnessing their chirality to achieve ultrafast magnetization switching remains actively pursued. Here we demonstrate that terahertz-driven chiral phonons enable faster magnetization switching than linear phonons through the purely magnetoelastic coupling that transfers both energy and angular momentum. Only one phonon handedness efficiently transfers angular momentum to the spin system, which we explain by a large fictitious kinematic Barnett-like field at THz frequencies that destabilizes spin precession for the opposite chirality. Considering different regions of the spinwave spectrum, we find that switching conditions can be realized near the Γ-point where strong energy transfer and spinwave excitation dominate, and near the P-point which offers minimal energy loss. Our results establish phonon chirality as a decisive and previously overlooked parameter in spin-lattice dynamics within the magnetoelastic coupling mechanism, offering a promising avenue for ultrafast low-energy spintronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文证明太赫兹驱动的手性声子通过纯磁弹性耦合比线性声子能更快地实现磁化翻转，并解释了手性在自旋-晶格动力学中的关键作用。
AI.motivation: 探索利用声子手性实现超快磁化翻转的可能性，寻找比传统线性声子更高效的自旋操控方式。
AI.method: 利用太赫兹驱动的手性声子，通过纯磁弹性耦合同时传递能量和角动量；引入类似Barnett效应的动力学假想场解释手性选择机制；分析Γ点和P点附近的自旋波谱特性。
AI.result: 手性声子比线性声子实现更快的磁化翻转；仅一种手性声子能有效传递角动量；Γ点附近能量传递和自旋波激发强，P点附近能量损耗最小。
AI.conclusion: 声子手性是自旋-晶格动力学中此前被忽视的关键参数，为超快低能耗自旋电子器件提供了新方向。

title: Comprehensive pKa Data Augmentation from Limited Real Data through an Engineered Models-Quantum Framework
summary: Proton dissociation constants (pKa) are critical for functional molecule discovery and molecular modeling. Building on iBonD, the largest experimental pKa database established, we and other researchers have developed several methods including machine-learning-based empirical prediction and high-accuracy energy calculations. Despite this foundation, the rapid augmentation of high-quality pKa data remains fundamentally constrained. As part of this work, we performed large-scale regression-based pKa prediction on unlabeled molecular datasets using a collection of extensively optimized machine-learning models. The results indicate that, since the feature distributions of unlabeled molecular datasets, the pKa data distribution approximates normality, with extreme scarcity of tail-region samples. Although such augmentation is highly valuable for improving overall data availability and predictive modeling, it remains insufficient for efficiently discovering molecules with broad-spectrum pKa properties. To address this, we explore the targeted generation of molecules with sparse pKa properties from the vast chemical space. Given that traditional continuous latent space VAE-RNN methods for molecular generation suffer from insufficient stability and fail to demonstrate clear advantages in complementing sparse data, we design and implement a quantum-assisted sparse-pKa molecular generation. Feasibility is validated on a simulated quantum annealer, and superior extreme-value sampling is further achieved on physical coherent Ising machines (CIMs). (to be continued)

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种量子辅助的稀疏pKa分子生成方法，利用量子退火和相干伊辛机来补充传统机器学习方法在生成极端pKa值分子上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有pKa数据增强方法虽然能提升整体数据量，但由于pKa数据呈正态分布，极端区域的样本极度稀缺，传统方法难以高效发现具有宽谱pKa性质的分子。
AI.method: 大规模回归预测 + VAE-RNN分析 + 量子辅助分子生成（模拟量子退火器 + 物理相干伊辛机CIM）
AI.result: 量子辅助方法在模拟退火器上验证了可行性，并在物理CIM上实现了更优的极值采样。
AI.conclusion: 量子辅助生成能有效补充稀疏pKa分子，克服传统连续潜空间VAE-RNN方法稳定性不足和稀疏数据补充劣势的问题。

title: Tensor network compression using fluid dynamics as a testbed: Analytical foundations in one dimension
summary: High performance computers produce extreme-scale data sets that require sampling or compression if they are to be used to their full potential. Existing data compression techniques typically exploit features such as sparsity in the data, homogeneity in the data, or {\it a priori} knowledge of what subsets of data are of most interest. Fluid dynamics data in general do not exhibit these features and so are attractive test beds for generic compression techniques that are objective, robust, and tuneable with respect to information lost due to compression. Presented here is a method based on tensor networks, specifically matrix product states or tensor trains, that meets these requirements. The method is demonstrated for compression in one-dimension and is extensible to higher dimensionality. Lossless compression is demonstrated for random Fourier series for sufficiently high bond dimension of the tensor network, with the memory required to store the tensor network scaling directly proportional to the bond dimension. The lossy compression exhibited at lower bond dimension can be well within the relative error of many fluid simulations. The compression algorithm is tested for the time evolution of Burger's equation with excellent results. We additionally demonstrate the capability to perform computations in the compressed form through a tensor network periodic convolution that can be orders of magnitude faster than using fast Fourier transforms and the convolution theorem. In addition to being an attractive method for working with data sets generated by existing computers, the tensor network methods utilised are directly translatable to the emerging paradigm of quantum computing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于张量网络（矩阵乘积态/张量列）的数据压缩方法，适用于高性能计算产生的极端规模数据集。该方法在一维压缩中实现了无损压缩，并通过伯格斯方程时间演化测试表现出色，同时支持在压缩形式下的周期性卷积运算，计算速度可比快速傅里叶变换快几个数量级。
AI.motivation: 高性能计算机产生的数据规模极大，需要有效的采样或压缩才能充分利用。现有压缩技术通常依赖数据稀疏性、同质性或先验知识，而流体动力学数据不具备这些特征，因此需要一种客观、鲁棒、可调谐信息损失的通用压缩方法。
AI.method: 基于张量网络，具体采用矩阵乘积态（MPS）/张量列（TT）方法。通过调整张量网络的键维度（bond dimension）实现无损到有损压缩的调谐，并设计了张量网络周期性卷积（tensor network periodic convolution）以支持压缩形式下的直接计算。
AI.result: 1）在足够高的键维度下，对随机傅里叶级数实现了无损压缩，存储需求与键维度成正比；2）较低键维度下的有损压缩误差可控制在流体仿真误差范围内；3）在伯格斯方程时间演化测试中取得了优异效果；4）压缩形式下的卷积运算可比快速傅里叶变换快数个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 张量网络方法是一种有效的流体数据压缩方案，兼顾客观性、鲁棒性和可调谐性，并且可直接迁移至量子计算范式，具有广泛的应用前景。

authors: M. D. Le. P. J. Baker
title: Exotic magnetism and persistent spin dynamics in a frustrated Jeff = 1/2 triangular lattice antiferromagnet
summary: The delicate interplay between competing degrees of freedom, anisotropy, and frustration-induced strong quantum fluctuations in pseudospin-$J_{\rm eff}=1/2$ rare-earth triangular-lattice antiferromagnets offers a promising platform for the experimental realization of exotic states with nontrivial low-energy excitations. Here, we present thermodynamic, inelastic neutron scattering (INS), and muon spin relaxation ($μ$SR) investigations of the frustrated magnet K$_3$NdTe$_2$O$9$, in which Nd$^{3+}$ ions constitute a structurally perfect triangular lattice with no detectable site disorder. The experiments reveal the realization of a Kramers doublet ground state with $J{\rm eff}=1/2$ moments, well separated from the first excited state, which interact antiferromagnetically with an exchange interaction of $\sim$0.6 K between the Nd$^{3+}$ moments in the triangular plane. The absence of oscillations and the so-called 1/3 plateau in the zero-field $μ$SR asymmetry down to 50 mK rules out long-range magnetic ordering and spin freezing on the $μ$SR time scale, respectively. The temperature dependence of the zero-field $μ$SR relaxation rate is well described by the Orbach relaxation mechanism, indicating the existence of fluctuating moments in the ground state of this frustrated magnet. Our results demonstrate exotic magnetism and persistent spin dynamics down to 50 mK. These observations establish this new family of frustrated rare-earth triangular-lattice antiferromagnets as a promising venue for the experimental realization of nontrivial quantum states with exotic low-energy excitations.

AI.tldr: 本文通过热力学、非弹性中子散射和μ子自旋弛豫实验，研究了K₃NdTe₂O₉中Nd³⁺离子构成的完美三角晶格反铁磁体。实验表明该系统具有J_eff=1/2的基态、反铁磁交换作用~0.6 K，且在50 mK下未发现长程磁有序或自旋冻结，持续存在自旋动力学，为研究奇异量子态提供了新平台。
AI.motivation: 在赝自旋J_eff=1/2稀土三角晶格反铁磁体中，竞争自由度、各向异性和阻挫诱导的强量子涨落之间的微妙相互作用，为实验实现具有非平凡低能激发的奇异量子态提供了有前景的平台。作者希望探索这一体系中是否存在新奇磁性行为。
AI.method: 采用热力学测量、非弹性中子散射（INS）和μ子自旋弛豫（μSR）三种实验手段，对K₃NdTe₂O₉单晶/多晶样品进行表征。INS用于确定自旋基态和交换作用；μSR用于探测低至50 mK的磁有序和自旋动力学。
AI.result: (1) Nd³⁺形成结构完美的三角晶格，无位点无序；(2) 实现了J_eff=1/2的Kramers双基态，与第一激发态分离良好；(3) 面内反铁磁交换作用~0.6 K；(4) 零场μSR在50 mK下无振荡也无1/3平台，排除了长程磁有序和自旋冻结；(5) 弛豫率随温度变化符合Orbach弛豫机制，表明基态存在涨落磁矩。
AI.conclusion: K₃NdTe₂O₉在极低温下展现奇异磁性和持续自旋动力学，是一种新的阻挫稀土三角晶格反铁磁体家族，为实验实现具有非平凡低能激发的奇特量子态提供了有前景的研究平台。

title: Derivation of height field theory for the two-dimensional classical dimer model from a Grassmann-integral representation
summary: The classical dimer model on bipartite lattices hosts a Coulomb phase, characterized by algebraic correlations and topological order. Its long-wavelength properties can be described by the fluctuations of a vector field with zero divergence, which, in two dimensions, is equivalent to a continuum height model. We show how this field theory can be derived constructively for both square and honeycomb lattices, starting from an exact representation of the dimer model in terms of Grassmann integrals. Taking the continuum limit gives a massless Dirac fermion in two-dimensional Euclidean space, which, using bosonization in the path integral representation, maps exactly to the well-known height field theory, incorporating the relationship between its boundary discontinuity (or "tilt") and the flux. By including source terms coupling to the flux density and the local valence-bond-solid order parameter, which we show are the only ones required to describe the asymptotic long-distance correlations, we derive expressions for the dimer observables in terms of the height.

AI.tldr: 本文通过Grassmann积分和玻色化方法，从微观严格表示出发，系统推导了方格和蜂窝格子上二聚体模型的连续高度场理论，并建立了边界间断与通量之间的关系。
AI.motivation: 经典二聚体模型在偶极子格点上表现出库仑相，其长波性质可用无散矢量场或高度模型描述。作者希望从严格的微观表示出发，系统地推导出这一连续场论，填补从微观到宏观之间的理论鸿沟。
AI.method: 利用Grassmann积分精确表示二聚体模型，取连续极限得到二维欧氏空间中的无质量狄拉克费米子，再通过路径积分玻色化方法将其映射到高度场理论，并引入耦合通量密度和局域价键固体序参量的源项。
AI.result: 成功导出了高度场理论，明确了边界间断（"倾斜"）与通量之间的关系，并推导了二聚体可观测量的高度场表达式，仅需两类源项即可描述渐近长程关联。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为二聚体模型的连续场论描述提供了严格的微观推导基础，揭示了Grassmann表示、狄拉克费米子与高度场之间的深层联系。

title: Superconductivity from emergent dipolar interactions in a fractionalized Fermi liquid
summary: Starting from the spin-fermion model or Hertz-Millis theory describing electrons coupled to anti-ferromagnetic spin fluctuations we develop a theory to describe the transition from a fractionalized Fermi liquid into a $d_{x^2-y^2}$ superconductor. We focus on small electron doping on top of the half-filled state. The doped electrons enter the system as spinon-chargon bound states, which form a small, reconstructed Fermi surface. The bound states are neutral under the emergent U(1) gauge symmetry of the fractionalized Fermi liquid, but interact via a dipolar two-body potential. We show that because of the projective action of translation symmetry on the spinons and chargons, the Fourier components of this repulsive dipolar interaction are peaked at the anti-ferromagnetic wave vector, thereby providing a robust microscopic mechanism for $d_{x^2-y^2}$ pairing in a fractionalized metal.

AI.tldr: 本文基于自旋-费米子模型或Hertz-Millis理论，研究从分数化费米液体到d_{x^2-y^2}超导体的转变机制，重点解释了掺杂电子以自旋子-电荷子束缚态形式进入系统，并通过偶极相互作用在反铁磁波矢处产生配对，从而形成d波超导的微观机制。
AI.motivation: 理解分数化费米液体如何向d波超导体转变，寻找分数化金属中d波配对的微观机制。
AI.method: 基于自旋-费米子模型/Hertz-Millis理论，分析电子掺杂进入反铁磁背景的行为，利用投影对称性分析偶极相互作用的傅里叶分量在反铁磁波矢处出现峰值。
AI.result: 掺杂电子形成自旋子-电荷子束缚态，构成重构的小费米面；偶极相互作用的傅里叶分量在反铁磁波矢处呈现峰值，从而驱动d_{x^2-y^2}配对。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为分数化金属中d波超导配对提供了坚实的微观机制，揭示了投影平移对称性与反铁磁涨落的关键作用。

title: Operator ordering as an emergent gauge field in twisted bilayer graphene: singular spectral signatures at the magic angle
summary: Scanning-tunnelling spectroscopy at the AB and BA stacking points of magic-angle twisted bilayer graphene should reveal two asymmetric Van~Hove peaks separated by $Δ_{\mathrm{split}}\approx 171$~meV -- a splitting absent from the standard Bistritzer--MacDonald spectrum. We show this signature arises naturally from the Hermitian ordering correction of the Dirac Hamiltonian with spatially varying mass, which generates an emergent Aharonov--Bohm flux of $h/(2e)$ at each zero of the effective mass $m_{\mathrm{eff}}(\mathbf{r})=w|f(\mathbf{r})|$. In the chiral limit, the interlayer coupling is locally diagonalised by a spatially dependent unitary transformation; the ordering term $H_{\mathrm{ord}}=-\tfrac{i}{2}\boldsymbolσ\cdot \nabla\ln m_{\mathrm{eff}}$ then develops a $1/r$ singularity at the AB/BA stacking points, where $m_{\mathrm{eff}}$ vanishes. The splitting scales as $\sqrtθ$ -- distinguishing it from correlation-driven gaps ($\proptoθ$ or $\propto 1/θ$) -- is gate-voltage independent, and is spatially localised within $r_c\approx 2.1$~nm of each AB/BA point. Within the local asymptotic theory near the zeros of $\mathrm{eff}$, the ordering-corrected zero mode acquires parabolic-cylinder character $D_{-1/2}$. The spatially resolved AB/BA spectrum reported in recent STM studies of magic-angle TBG has not been analysed for two-peak structure and constitutes an immediate experimental test; the predicted cell-averaged broadening of $\approx 14$~meV is consistent with the $16$~meV discrepancy between existing STM data and the BM tight-binding prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文指出魔角扭曲双层石墨烯中AB/BA堆叠点应出现约171 meV分裂的不对称Van Hove峰，该分裂源于狄拉克哈密顿量在空间变化质量下的Hermitian排序修正，产生h/(2e)的Aharonov-Bohm通量。排序修正项在AB/BA点有1/r奇异性，分裂标度为√θ，与关联驱动能隙不同，局域在AB/BA点附近2.1 nm内。该预测可通过现有STM数据检验。
AI.motivation: 标准Bistritzer-MacDonald能谱无法解释AB/BA堆叠点处Van Hove峰的分裂现象，作者试图找出这一被忽视的信号背后的物理起源。
AI.method: 从具有空间变化质量的狄拉克哈密顿量的Hermitian排序修正出发，推导出有效的Aharonov-Bohm通量；在手性极限下通过空间依赖的幺正变换对角化层间耦合，得到排序项H_ord = -(i/2)σ·∇ln m_eff，该项在质量为零的AB/BA点产生1/r奇异性；建立局域渐近理论，给出修正后的零模为抛物柱面函数D_{-1/2}形式。
AI.result: 预测AB/BA堆叠点处两个不对称Van Hove峰分裂Δ_split≈171 meV，分裂标度为√θ（区别于关联驱动的∝θ或∝1/θ），与栅压无关，空间局域在r_c≈2.1 nm范围内。预测的晶胞平均展宽≈14 meV，与现有STM数据与BM紧束缚预测之间16 meV的偏差一致。
AI.conclusion: 该排序修正机制为魔角TBG中AB/BA堆叠点处的能谱分裂提供了自然的几何解释，可通过已有STM数据直接检验，无需依赖新实验。

title: Machine learning insights into band gap properties in halide-based perovskites
summary: Halide perovskites show great promise for applications in optoelectronic devices. The lead-free perovskites are attracting increasing interest due to their low toxicity and motivate the exploration of alternative compositions and structures, including A$_2$BX$_6$, A$_2$BB$^\prime$X$_6$, A$_3$B$_2$X$_9$, and A$_4$BX$_6$. Accurate predictions of a wide range of band gap energies are important for designing new materials. It is also desired to generate a direct relationship between the structural and elemental descriptors and the band gap energies. In this work, we develop machine learning models to predict band gap energies across various types of halide perovskites based on atomic and structural properties. Algorithms including ensemble tree-based methods, random forest regression (RFR), gradient boosted regression trees (GBRT), and extreme gradient boosting (XGB) showed strong predictive accuracy. We also analyzed feature importance to identify key descriptors, including B-site and X-site elemental properties, as well as the number of A- and B-site atoms, as primary factors influencing band gap energies. These results improve our understanding of the ML models and provide guidance for designing new halide perovskite materials.

AI.tldr: 本文利用机器学习模型（RFR、GBRT、XGB）预测多种卤化物钙钛矿的带隙能量，并识别出关键描述符（B位、X位元素性质及A、B位原子数），为设计新型无铅钙钛矿材料提供指导。
AI.motivation: 无铅卤化物钙钛矿因低毒性而备受关注，但带隙能量的准确预测对于设计新材料至关重要，且需要建立结构与带隙之间的直接关系。
AI.method: 基于原子和结构属性，采用集成树方法（随机森林RFR、梯度提升回归树GBRT、极限梯度提升XGB）构建机器学习模型，预测多种类型卤化物钙钛矿的带隙能量，并进行特征重要性分析。
AI.result: RFR、GBRT和XGB算法均表现出高预测精度；特征重要性分析表明B位和X位元素性质、以及A位和B位原子数是影响带隙能量的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 该研究加深了对机器学习模型的理解，为设计新型卤化物钙钛矿材料提供了指导方向。

title: Limitations of Using BCA Codes for Modeling the Sputtering Behavior of Planetary Surfaces
summary: Binary collision approximation (BCA) codes are potentially powerful tools to simulate ion irradiation ejecta properties, such as the composition and the angular and energy distributions of the sputter yield. However, recent advances in the sputtering of minerals have highlighted the low predictive fidelity of BCA codes such as SDTrimSP when compared to experimental measurements. We demonstrate how a sputtering model that underestimates the forward sputtering on a flat surface at large ion incidence angles from surface normal will lead to an erroneous result for rough and porous surfaces, where most ejected particles are directed along the surface normal. We demonstrate how this is the case for an existing model, which reliably predicts sputtering mass yields from a flat enstatite surface but fails to accurately reproduce the angular distribution of sputtered particles. We then compare this to a BCA model incorporating higher surface-binding energies$-$based on a molecular dynamics description of plagioclase$-$which underestimates mass yields but significantly reduces back-sputtering and better reproduces laboratory sputter angle distributions measured at large ion incidence angles. We conclude that the BCA model cannot simultaneously reproduce both the sputter yield and the sputter angle distribution arising from He irradiation of mineral targets, either due to the inherent geometric simplicity of the BCA or because the model neglects yield-enhancing processes such as molecule and cluster sputtering. This demonstrates a structural limitation of current BCA-based models when realistic surface morphologies are considered, rather than a problem that can be resolved by parameter tuning alone.

AI.tldr: 本文指出二元碰撞近似（BCA）代码在模拟矿物溅射时存在结构性限制：现有模型无法同时准确预测溅射产额和溅射角度分布。通过对比两种BCA模型（一种能预测产额但角度分布不准，另一种相反），作者认为这是由于BCA内在的几何简化或忽略了分子/团簇溅射等产额增强过程所致，且无法通过参数调优解决。
AI.motivation: BCA代码在模拟离子辐照喷射物特性（如成分、角度和能量分布）上具有潜力，但近期矿物溅射研究显示其预测准确性较低，特别是在粗糙和多孔表面场景下。
AI.method: 对比两种BCA模型：一种（现有模型）能可靠预测平坦顽辉石表面的溅射质量产额但无法准确再现溅射粒子的角度分布；另一种（基于分子动力学描述的高表面结合能模型）低估了质量产额但减少了反向溅射，更好地再现了大入射角下的实验室溅射角度分布。
AI.result: 现有BCA模型无法同时准确预测溅射产额和溅射角度分布，特别是在大入射角或粗糙多孔表面场景下。低估前向溅射的模型会导致粗糙表面的结果错误。
AI.conclusion: BCA模型存在结构性局限性，无法同时再现He辐照矿物靶的溅射产额和角度分布，这源于BCA的几何简化或对分子/团簇溅射等机制的忽略，无法通过参数调优来解决。

title: Constitutive modelling of magneto-active polymers at finite strains: A survey
summary: Magneto-active polymers (MAPs) are field-responsive soft composites whose mechanical behaviour can be actively modified by external magnetic fields. Their ability to exhibit field-induced stiffening, magnetostriction, anisotropy and rate-dependent response makes them attractive for sensors, actuators, adaptive structures, vibration-control devices and soft robotic systems. This article presents a structured survey of constitutive modelling approaches for MAPs at finite strains. The review traces the development from early semi-empirical descriptions to thermodynamically consistent nonlinear continuum theories, with particular attention to isotropic and anisotropic magnetoelastic constitutive models, invariant-based and spectral representations, variational and polyconvex frameworks, microstructurally motivated models, dispersed-chain descriptions and magneto-viscoelastic theories. The principal constitutive variables, energy functions, coupling mechanisms and physical assumptions underlying the main models are discussed. The survey shows that constitutive modelling of MAPs has developed into a broad family of nonlinear, anisotropic and dissipative frameworks capable of describing versatile behaviours observed experimentally. Important challenges remain in resolving thermo-magneto-mechanical coupling and microstructure-sensitive effects, identification of parameters, validation of models as well as robust and efficient implementation on computers.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了磁活性聚合物在有限应变下的本构建模方法，从早期半经验描述到热力学一致的非线性连续介质理论，涵盖各向同性与各向异性磁弹性模型、不变量和谱表示、变分与多凸框架、微结构驱动模型、分散链描述及磁粘弹性理论，并指出了当前面临的挑战。
AI.motivation: 磁活性聚合物（MAPs）因其场致硬化、磁致伸缩、各向异性和率相关响应等特性，在传感器、执行器、自适应结构、振动控制及软体机器人等领域具有重要应用前景，因此需要系统梳理其本构建模方法的发展脉络。
AI.method: 采用结构化综述方法，追踪了本构建模方法从早期半经验描述到热力学一致的非线性连续介质理论的演变，详细讨论了各向同性与各向异性磁弹性模型、不变量与谱表示、变分与多凸框架、微结构驱动模型、分散链描述及磁粘弹性理论等主要框架。
AI.result: 该综述表明，MAPs的本构建模已发展成为一个涵盖非线性、各向异性和耗散框架的大家族，能够描述实验中观察到的多样化行为。
AI.conclusion: 尽管已取得显著进展，但在热-磁-力耦合效应、微结构敏感性效应、参数识别、模型验证以及鲁棒高效的计算机实现等方面仍存在重要挑战。

title: Antisite-disorder driven tuning of magnetic properties and exchange-bias in Nd$_{2-x}$Sr$_{x}$CoMnO$_{6-δ}$ $(0 \leq x \leq 1)$ ($δ\sim 0.5$) double perovskites
summary: We demonstrate precise control of exchange bias (EB) in the Nd$_{2-x}$Sr$_x$CoMnO$_{6-δ}$ ($0 \leq x \leq 1$) double-perovskite series through Sr$^{2+}$ induced hole doping, unveiling a remarkable transition between normal and inverse EB states. Employing neutron powder diffraction and X-ray absorption spectroscopy, we reveal a structural evolution from a B-site-ordered monoclinic ($P2_1/n$) phase to a disordered rhombohedral ($R\overline{3}c$) phase with increasing $x$, accompanied by a shift in the effective Co valence from +2 toward +3, while the Mn valence remains essentially unchanged. DC magnetization measurements indicate a gradual suppression of ferromagnetism with hole doping, whereas AC susceptibility measurements at $x = 0.75$ reveal pronounced cluster-glass behavior and the highest EB field of $\sim 4$ kOe at 8 K under a 6 T cooling field. After correcting for minor-loop effects, we identify robust inverse EB at $x = 0.75$, persisting even under a cooling field of 6 T. We attribute this phenomenon to competing ferromagnetic--antiferromagnetic and ferromagnetic--glassy interfaces, governed by strong magnetic frustration and the magnetocrystalline anisotropy associated with rare-earth 4$f$ electrons. These findings elucidate the pivotal role of doping-induced structural and magnetic competition in tailoring EB behavior in rare-earth double perovskites, providing new insights for the design of advanced magnetic materials.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过Sr掺杂调控Nd₂₋ₓSrₓCoMnO₆₋δ双钙钛矿中的交换偏置效应，实现了正常与反常交换偏置态的可控转变，并在x=0.75处观察到最强的交换偏置场（~4 kOe）和团簇玻璃行为。
AI.motivation: 探索通过空穴掺杂（Sr²⁺替代）调控双钙钛矿体系中交换偏置效应的可行性，并理解其微观机制，为设计先进磁性材料提供新思路。
AI.method: 利用中子粉末衍射和X射线吸收光谱表征结构及价态演变；通过直流磁化强度和交流磁化率测量研究磁性能；对minor-loop效应进行校正以确认真实的反常交换偏置。
AI.result: 随着x增大，体系从B位有序单斜相(P2₁/n)转变为无序菱方相(R\overline{3}c)；Co价态从+2向+3偏移，Mn价态基本不变；铁磁性被抑制；x=0.75时表现出团簇玻璃行为和最高交换偏置场~4 kOe（8 K，6 T冷却场），且校正后仍为稳定的反常交换偏置。
AI.conclusion: 掺杂诱导的结构和磁性竞争是调控交换偏置行为的关键，该现象源于铁磁-反铁磁和铁磁-玻璃态界面的竞争，受磁阻挫和稀土4f电子的磁晶各向异性支配。

title: Why dimensional analysis works: general classification of self-similarity based on scale-invariance
summary: In this work, we formulate self-similarity from the perspective of scale invariance, where a self-similar form is understood as the transformation of a function into a form invariant under scale transformations. By applying this formulation to physical parameters, which consist of numerical values and units, it is demonstrated that dimensional analysis works for physical problems because scale invariance is partially shared between units and physical parameters. This naturally leads to the distinction between similarity of the first kind and similarity of the second kind according to whether the scale functions induced by units and those associated with physical parameters are equivalent or not. Self-similar solutions of the second kind can be further classified according to whether the power exponents of the similarity parameters include functions of dimensionless numbers. This leads to the conclusion that there are three kinds of self-similar solutions. The present work provides a unified framework for understanding dimensional analysis and a universal classification of self-similarity in physical problems.

AI.tldr: 本文从尺度不变性视角重新定义自相似性，证明量纲分析的有效性源于单位与物理参数间共享的尺度不变性，并据此将自相似解分为三类，为量纲分析和自相似性提供了统一框架。
AI.motivation: 现有自相似性理论缺乏统一的数学定义，量纲分析与自相似性之间的关系尚未被清晰阐明。作者希望从尺度不变性的视角出发，建立自相似性的严格数学表述，并揭示其与量纲分析的内在联系。
AI.method: 将自相似性定义为函数在尺度变换下形式不变的性质；将该定义应用于包含数值和单位的物理参数；通过分析单位诱导的尺度函数与物理参数相关的尺度函数之间的等价性，区分第一类和第二类相似性；进一步根据相似参数幂指数是否包含无量纲数的函数，对第二类自相似解进行细分。
AI.result: 得出了三类自相似解的分类体系：第一类相似性（单位尺度函数与物理参数尺度函数等价）、第二类相似性的两种子类型（幂指数是否依赖于无量纲数）。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为理解量纲分析提供了统一的理论框架，并建立了物理问题中自相似性的普适分类体系。

title: Hybrid Ferromagnet-SNSPDs: Single photon induced order-to-disorder transition in ferromagnets coupled to thin film superconductors
summary: The development of midwave and longwave infrared single photon detectors is crucial for their emerging applications in spectroscopy, remote sensing, exoplanet detection, and free space quantum communications. However, existing sensors need to be operated at extremely low temperatures (0.08-0.9K) to reduce dark noise and hence require the use of advanced cryogenics such as dilution refrigerators or $^3$He cryogens, significantly limiting applications. Here we propose a vortex-engineering approach based on a hybrid phase transition in a ferromagnet/superconductor bilayer to increase the operating temperature of infrared single photon detectors up to 3.75K. We show that the introduction of a ferromagnetic layer produces a local magnetic field which impedes vortex crossing in the superconductor, reducing dark noise. When a single photon is incident, the photon-induced hotspot causes an order-to-disorder transition in the ferromagnet, leading to a vortex-induced phase transition in the superconducting layer. By engineering the ferromagnet's Curie temperature to be close to the device's operating temperature, single photon sensitivity can be achieved at increased operating temperatures. We predict at midwave/longwave infrared wavelengths (3-14$μ$m) the operating temperature can be raised to 3.25-3.75K, enabling significantly simpler cooling systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种涡旋工程方法，通过在铁磁体/超导体双层结构中引入混合相变，将中波/长波红外单光子探测器的工作温度从0.08-0.9K提升至3.25-3.75K，从而显著简化冷却系统。
AI.motivation: 现有红外单光子探测器需在极低温（0.08-0.9K）下运行以降低暗噪声，依赖稀释制冷机或³He制冷等复杂低温系统，严重限制了实际应用。因此，迫切需要提高工作温度以简化冷却方案。
AI.method: 提出涡旋工程方法：在铁磁体/超导体双层结构中，铁磁层产生的局域磁场阻碍超导体中涡旋穿越，降低暗噪声。当单光子入射时，光子诱导的热点触发铁磁层中有序-无序转变，进而引起超导层中涡旋诱导的相变。通过将铁磁层居里温度设计为接近器件工作温度，可在较高温度下实现单光子灵敏度。
AI.result: 预测在中波/长波红外波段（3-14μm），工作温度可提升至3.25-3.75K，相比现有0.08-0.9K有显著提高。
AI.conclusion: 该涡旋工程方法能有效提高红外单光子探测器的工作温度，使更简单的冷却系统成为可能，有望推动光谱学、遥感、系外行星探测和自由空间量子通信等领域的实际应用。

title: Dispersive mode coupling in $p$-doped semiconductor nanomechanical resonators
summary: Dispersive coupling between vibrational modes with different frequencies is a major nonlinear dynamical effect. We show that in $p$-doped semiconductors such coupling is strongly enhanced. Moreover, the coupling parameters increase with the order of the nonlinearity. The doping-induced dispersive coupling becomes much stronger than the intrinsic one already for moderately strong doping. Its dependence on the hole density is nonmonotonic, and the temperature dependence becomes nonmonotonic for higher densities. Relevant mesoscopic frequency fluctuations are briefly discussed. The results are applied to Si resonators, where doping is used to compensate the temperature dependence of a clock mode, whereas another low-frequency mode is used as a thermometer to enable temperature stabilization.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了p型掺杂半导体中振动模式之间的色散耦合效应，发现掺杂能显著增强该耦合，且耦合参数随非线性阶数增加而增大。掺杂引起的色散耦合在中等掺杂强度下已远超本征耦合，并表现出对空穴密度的非单调依赖关系。研究还讨论了相关的介观频率涨落，并将结果应用于硅谐振器中，利用掺杂补偿时钟模式的温度依赖性，同时用低频模式作为温度计实现温度稳定。
AI.motivation: 揭示p型掺杂半导体中掺杂对振动模式间色散耦合的增强机制，探索其与非线性阶数、掺杂浓度及温度的依赖关系。
AI.method: 理论分析p型掺杂半导体中振动模式的色散耦合，计算耦合参数随非线性阶数、空穴密度和温度的变化规律，并讨论介观频率涨落的影响。
AI.result: 掺杂能大幅增强色散耦合，耦合参数随非线性阶数增加而增大；中等掺杂下掺杂诱导耦合远超本征耦合；耦合对空穴密度呈非单调依赖，高密度下温度依赖也变为非单调。
AI.conclusion: 掺杂诱导的色散耦合可用于硅谐振器设计中，通过掺杂补偿时钟模式的温度依赖性，并利用低频模式作为温度计实现温度稳定。

title: Physics-Informed Attention Mechanism and Generalization Capability of Deep Learning-Based Grain Growth Evolution Prediction
summary: Machine Learning (ML) models for grain growth prediction are typically trained on idealized synthetic data, yet practical applications require generalization to conditions outside the training distribution. This study evaluated the Out-Of-Distribution (OOD) generalization capability of the trained model from our previous study across three test cases, including experimental microstructures, microstructures characterized by a bimodal grain size distribution, and abnormal grain growth. To further probe whether physics-informed architectural design could improve robustness under these different conditions, a boundary-masked attention mechanism was proposed specifically for grain growth, constraining attention to grain boundary pixels. Both the baseline and the proposed physics-informed attention model were evaluated without retraining or fine-tuning on the OOD data. Both models successfully generalized to all three test cases, yet the boundary-masked attention mechanism provided substantial improvements, with the most notable gains for microstructures characterized by a bimodal grain size distribution, where Structural Similarity Index Measure (SSIM) improved from \num{0.6221} to \num{0.7609} and mean grain size ($\overline{R}$) error decreased from \SI{8.75}{\percent} to \SI{3.57}{\percent}. The attention heatmap analysis revealed that the boundary-masked attention model learned to concentrate attention on large grain boundaries in a manner consistent with curvature-driven grain growth physics, emerging from training without being explicitly encoded into the architecture. These results indicate that models trained on synthetic data can generalize to diverse OOD conditions without retraining, and that physics-informed attention may improve accuracy when the boundary morphology matches the training domain.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了先前训练好的机器学习晶粒生长预测模型在三种测试场景（实验组织、双峰晶粒尺寸分布、异常晶粒生长）下的分布外泛化能力，并提出了一种边界掩码注意力机制来提升模型鲁棒性。结果表明，模型无需重新训练即可泛化到分布外数据，且物理启发的注意力机制显著提升了预测精度，尤其是在双峰晶粒尺寸分布场景下（SSIM从0.6221提升至0.7609，平均晶粒尺寸误差从8.75%降至3.57%）。
AI.motivation: 晶粒生长预测的机器学习模型通常在理想化合成数据上训练，但实际应用需要模型能泛化到训练分布之外的条件。现有研究缺乏对分布外泛化能力的系统评估，因此本文旨在测试模型在非理想条件下的表现，并探索物理启发的架构设计能否提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 使用先前训练的基线模型，针对晶粒生长提出了边界掩码注意力机制，限制注意力仅作用于晶界像素。在不重新训练或微调的情况下，分别在三种分布外测试场景（实验组织、双峰晶粒尺寸分布、异常晶粒生长）下评估基线模型和物理启发注意力模型的泛化性能。
AI.result: 两种模型均成功泛化到所有三种分布外测试场景。边界掩码注意力机制带来了显著改进，其中在双峰晶粒尺寸分布场景下效果最为突出：SSIM从0.6221提升至0.7609，平均晶粒尺寸误差从8.75%降低至3.57%。注意力热图分析表明，边界掩码注意力模型学会将注意力集中在晶界上，与曲率驱动的晶粒生长物理机制一致。
AI.conclusion: 在合成数据上训练的模型无需重新训练即可泛化到多样化的分布外条件；物理启发的注意力机制能够提升预测精度，但前提是边界形态与训练域匹配；模型学到的注意力模式与物理原理相一致，说明物理知识可隐式地从数据中涌现。

title: Variational Quantum Eigensolver-Based Quantum Bootstrap Embedding for Molecules
comment: 22 pages, 2 figures, 4 tables. Code available at: https://github.com/littlebullGit/QBEMol
summary: Simulating strongly correlated molecular systems on near-term quantum hardware remains challenging due to modern hardware's limited quantum volume and moderate-fidelity qubits. One potential way to circumvent this challenge is through bootstrap embedding (BE). Bootstrap embedding breaks molecules into smaller fragments that are then embedded into the "bath" of other fragments in an iterative way. Bootstrap embedding is appealing for quantum simulation because fragmenting the system reduces the qubit requirements for any given fragment. In this work, we develop a quantum bootstrap embedding (QBE) workflow that uses variational quantum eigensolver (VQE) fragment solvers and study the algorithmic choices that determine the overall VQE-QBE algorithm's success. To improve efficiency, we introduce FastAdaptVQE, a sparse matrix-accelerated form of the adaptive variational quantum eigensolver (ADAPT-VQE) that replaces symbolic commutator evaluation with direct statevector linear algebra, and MatrixFreeAdaptVQE, a matrix-free extension that removes the sparse-matrix memory bottleneck that appears when treating larger fragments. We also modify the ADAPT-VQE operator selection step by replacing the purely greedy choice with a look-ahead strategy. Benchmarks on $H_4$ and $F_2$ reach chemical accuracy, within 1 kcal/mol of bootstrap embedding results using a full configuration interaction (FCI) solver. These results show that combining QBE with VQE can accurately calculate energies of molecular systems. This research lays the foundation for extending energy calculations to larger molecular systems and quantum materials on near-term quantum hardware.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了量子自举嵌入（QBE）工作流，结合变分量子本征求解器（VQE）来模拟强关联分子体系，通过引入FastAdaptVQE和MatrixFreeAdaptVQE等算法改进，在H₄和F₂基准上达到了化学精度。
AI.motivation: 近期的量子硬件量子体积有限、量子比特保真度中等，难以模拟强关联分子体系。自举嵌入（BE）通过将分子分解为更小的片段来降低量子比特需求，因此将其与量子计算结合具有潜力。
AI.method: 开发了量子自举嵌入（QBE）工作流，使用VQE作为片段求解器；提出FastAdaptVQE（用稀疏矩阵加速替代符号对易子计算）和MatrixFreeAdaptVQE（消除稀疏矩阵内存瓶颈）；修改ADAPT-VQE的算子选择策略，引入前瞻（look-ahead）方法替代纯贪心选择。
AI.result: 在H₄和F₂基准上达到化学精度（误差在1 kcal/mol以内），与使用全组态相互作用（FCI）求解器的自举嵌入结果一致。
AI.conclusion: QBE与VQE结合能够准确计算分子体系的能量，为在近量子硬件上扩展至更大分子体系和量子材料奠定了基础。

title: Latent Residual-Closure Fourier Neural Operator for Robust Multi-Field Solving in Particle-in-Cell Simulations
summary: Particle-in-cell (PIC) simulations are widely used for kinetic plasma modeling in energy applications, but their efficiency is often limited by repeated field solves on dense meshes. This work proposes a Latent Residual-Closure Fourier Neural Operator (LRC-FNO) for robust surrogate multi-field solving in PIC simulations. Rather than treating field prediction as a purely data-driven regression task, LRC-FNO formulates PIC field solving as a two-level residual-closure problem involving source compression and source-to-field operator mapping. An autoencoder extracts compact representations of particle-deposited source fields, while a Latent Closure Refiner recovers unresolved residual structures lost during compression. A Coarse-FNO Solver captures the dominant field response, and a Residual-Closure FNO restores full-resolution corrections. The method is tested on three benchmarks with increasing complexity: 1D linear Landau damping (LLD), 2D two-stream instability (TSI), and a 2D scrape-off layer (SOL) fusion plasma model. In LLD and TSI, LRC-FNO better preserves charge-to-potential mapping, potential-mode evolution, residual charge structures, and particle-field energy exchange during closed-loop PIC integration. In the SOL case, LRC-FNO achieves relative L2 errors of 0.0447 for the self-consistent potential and 0.0251 for the magnetic vector potential in single-step prediction. More importantly, when used as a neural initial guess with 20 iterative corrections, LRC-FNO maintains strong physical consistency in extrapolated closed-loop simulations, preserving charge and current density structures over a time range close to twice the training horizon. These results demonstrate that LRC-FNO can serve as both a fast surrogate field solver and a high-quality initialization strategy for iterative PIC field solvers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LRC-FNO，一种针对PIC模拟中多场求解的潜在残差-闭包傅里叶神经算子。该方法将场预测建模为两层级联残差闭包问题，在1D朗道阻尼、2D双流不稳定性及2D刮削层聚变等离子体模拟中，相比纯数据驱动方法具有更好的物理一致性，可作为快速代理求解器及迭代求解器的高质量初始化策略。
AI.motivation: 传统PIC模拟因密集网格上的反复场求解导致计算效率低下，亟需高效的代理模型来加速场求解过程。
AI.method: 提出LRC-FNO，包含自编码器提取源场紧致表示、潜在闭包精炼器恢复压缩中丢失的残差结构、粗粒度FNO求解器捕获主场均响应、残差闭包FNO恢复全分辨率校正。
AI.result: 在SOL等离子体模型中，单步预测相对L2误差为电势0.0447、磁矢势0.0251；在闭环外推模拟中，经20次迭代校正可在接近两倍训练时间范围内保持物理一致性。
AI.conclusion: LRC-FNO既能作为快速代理场求解器，又能为迭代PIC场求解器提供高质量初始化，具有良好的物理一致性和外推能力。

title: II. Exploring the role of the Crystal Electric Field in the vicinity of a Quantum Critical Point
summary: Very low temperature thermdynamic properties of the Yb$T_4M$ family of compounds are analyzed in a broad range of behavior including a quantum critical point QCP between magnetic and Fermi-liquid ground states GS. Doniach-Lavagna phase diagram limitations are improved by taking into account crystal electric field CEF splittings. The studied alloys: Yb$T_{5-x}M_x$ (with $T$= Ni, Cu, and $M$= Cd, Mg, Pd, Au, Zn, Ag), allow to gain insight into the evolution of the GS behavior undergoing the QCP region as a function of chemical doping as control parameter. Three types of behaviors are recognized in this system: i) a magnetic one, with weak interactions at $T_m\leq 1$\,K and very low Kondo temperature of their respective doublets GS. Between $T_m$ and $T_q\approx 0.3$\,K, quantum fluctuations start to dominate the scenario with the specific heat $C_{4f}/T(T\geq T_q)$ showing $T$ power law dependencies and a very heavy-fermion {\it plateau} below $T_q$. ii) beyond the QCP the typical non-fermi-liquid logarithmic $T$ dependence: $C_{4f}/T \propto \ln(T/T_0)$ and iii) at the non-magnetic limit, the alloys behave as valence-fluctuation systems with $T_K$ overcoming the CEF splitting. With this experimental information, a more realistic phase diagram can be drawn around the QCP where the scenario is dominated by low lying quantum fluctuations, without $C_{4f}/T|_{Lim T\to 0}$ divergences but a clear drop of its value.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析YbT₄M家族化合物在极低温下的热力学性质，研究了化学掺杂如何调控系统穿过量子临界点（QCP），并改进了Doniach-Lavagna相图，引入晶场分裂（CEF）效应。研究发现三种行为：磁有序态、非费米液体态和价涨落态，揭示了QCP附近低能量子涨落主导的物理图像。
AI.motivation: 现有Doniach-Lavagna相图未考虑晶场分裂（CEF）效应，对Yb基重费米子体系在极低温下穿越量子临界点（QCP）的行为描述不够精确。作者希望通过化学掺杂系统研究YbT₅₋ₓMₓ合金，揭示CEF分裂对基态演化和QCP附近物理行为的影响。
AI.method: 以YbT₅₋ₓMₓ（T=Ni, Cu; M=Cd, Mg, Pd, Au, Zn, Ag）为研究对象，以化学掺杂为控制参数，测量极低温下比热C₄f/T的温度依赖关系，分析其幂律行为、对数依赖等特征，区分不同基态类型。
AI.result: 识别出三类行为：(i) 磁有序态，T_m≤1 K，极低Kondo温度，在T_q≈0.3 K以下出现重费米子平台；(ii) 超越QCP后呈现非费米液体的对数温度依赖C₄f/T ∝ ln(T/T₀)；(iii) 非磁极限下表现为价涨落体系，T_K超过CEF分裂。在QCP附近未观察到C₄f/T发散，而是出现明显下降。
AI.conclusion: 考虑CEF分裂后，可构建更真实的QCP附近相图，其中低能量子涨落主导物理行为，且C₄f/T在极限温度下不发散而是下降，修正了传统理论预期。

title: Brownian gyration of an inertial ellipsoid
summary: Recent studies on Brownian gyration (BG) have focused primarily on spherically symmetric particles under overdamped conditions. To explore BG in the underdamped regime with a spherically asymmetric particle, we investigate the inertial dynamics of a microscopic ellipsoid in a dissipative medium. The particle is confined in a spherically asymmetric trap and simultaneously coupled to two distinct thermal reservoirs. This configuration drives the system into a nonequilibrium steady state (NESS) characterised by BG, which is quantified by the mean and fluctuation of the particle's specific angular momentum. Using inertial Langevin dynamics, we systematically analyze how this microscopic gyration depends not merely on the trap asymmetry and temperature difference, but also on the particle's intrinsic physical properties like shape and axial orientation, besides inertia. Our study uncovers fundamental differences between the gyration of spherical and non-spherical particles in overdamped as well as underdamped conditions, at microscopic scales. These findings provide key insights for optimizing Brownian gyration across a broader landscape of experimentally tuneable parameters.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了非球对称椭球颗粒在欠阻尼条件下的布朗旋转动力学，通过惯性朗之万动力学分析了颗粒形状、轴向取向、惯性等因素对布朗旋转的影响，并与过阻尼条件下的球形颗粒进行了对比。
AI.motivation: 现有布朗旋转研究主要针对过阻尼条件下的球形对称粒子，对于欠阻尼区域中非球对称粒子的布朗旋转行为尚缺乏理解，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用惯性朗之万动力学方法，建立微观椭球粒子在耗散介质中的惯性动力学模型，粒子被约束在非球对称陷阱中，同时耦合到两个不同温度的热库，通过粒子的比角动量的均值和涨落来量化布朗旋转。
AI.result: 发现布朗旋转不仅依赖于陷阱不对称性和温差，还显著依赖于颗粒的形状、轴向取向和惯性等内在物理性质；揭示了球形与非球形颗粒在过阻尼和欠阻尼条件下布朗旋转的基本差异。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为更广泛的实验可调参数空间下优化布朗旋转提供了关键见解。

title: How twist angle inhomogeneity masks the BKT transition and the order parameter symmetry
summary: Two-dimensional superconductors, including twisted multilayer graphene, should exhibit a BKT transition, and the $T$-dependence of the superfluid stiffness should distinguish between nodal or gapped order parameter symmetries. However, this picture dramatically changes when spatially correlated disorder is taken into account. Such correlations naturally arise in moiré systems due to twist angle inhomogeneities, which we model using elasticity theory. Using a random impedance network based on realistic disorder in the local $T_c$, we show that the finite-frequency conductance reveals a smeared percolative transition instead of a BKT transition. At low temperatures, the disorder can effectively obscure the distinction between nodal and fully gapped superconducting order parameters. We propose that the real part of the conductivity can be used as a key diagnostic observable to probe the relevance of correlated disorder.

AI.tldr: 本文研究空间关联无序对二维超导体（如扭曲多层石墨烯）中BKT相变的影响，发现无序会导致渗流型转变取代BKT转变，并模糊节点能隙与全能隙超导序参量的区分，提出实部电导率可作为诊断关联无序的关键观测量。
AI.motivation: 二维超导体（如扭曲多层石墨烯）理论上应呈现BKT转变，且超流刚度对温度依赖可区分节点或全能隙序参量。但实际莫尔体系中普遍存在扭转角不均匀性导致的空间关联无序，这种无序会如何改变上述图景尚不清楚。
AI.method: 利用弹性理论模拟莫尔体系中扭转角不均匀性引起的空间关联无序；构建基于局域Tc随机分布的阻抗网络模型；计算有限频率电导率以分析无序对相变行为的影响。
AI.result: 空间关联无序使BKT转变被涂抹的渗流型转变所取代；低温下无序有效模糊了节点能隙与全能隙超导序参量之间的区别。
AI.conclusion: 电导率实部可作为诊断关联无序相关性的关键实验观测量，为理解二维超导体中无序效应提供了新的探测手段。

title: Surface-switchable nonreciprocity protected by Fermi arcs in Weyl semimetal TaAs
summary: Weyl semimetals host topologically protected surface states, known as Fermi arcs, which connect bulk Weyl nodes in momentum space. Both bulk Weyl nodes and Fermi arcs are anticipated to be chiral. The chirality of bulk bands has been confirmed through observations of the chiral anomaly and Weyl orbits. In contrast, despite their discovery more than a decade ago, the chiral nature of Fermi arcs has remained unresolved. Here we report Fermi-arc-induced nonlinear transport in the archetypal Weyl semimetal TaAs. Using focused ion beam techniques, we fabricated micro-scale devices that enable simultaneous transport measurements on opposing topological surfaces. While linear transport remains dominated by bulk conduction, nonlinear transport uncovers surface-specific contributions, including an exceptionally large third-order nonreciprocal response that exceeds conventional expectations and highlights the crucial role of the singular arc endpoints. Our findings unambiguously demonstrate the chiral nature of Fermi arcs and establish nonlinear transport as a direct probe of these topological surface states. By revealing a surface-switchable, room-temperature nonlinear response that is topologically protected, this work introduces a new functionality in Weyl semimetals. Given the abundance of natural materials predicted to host topological semimetal states, these results open opportunities for exploring nonlinear transport phenomena and device concepts across a broad class of systems.

AI.tldr: 本文在Weyl半金属TaAs中观测到由费米弧表面态诱导的巨大非线性输运响应，首次实验证明了费米弧的手性特征，并展示了可在室温下工作的拓扑保护非线性器件功能。
AI.motivation: 尽管Weyl半金属的体态手性（如手性反常、Weyl轨道）已被实验证实，但费米弧作为拓扑保护表面态，其手性性质自发现十多年来一直未被直接验证。
AI.method: 利用聚焦离子束技术制备微米级器件，实现对相反拓扑表面同时进行电输运测量；通过区分线性输运（体态主导）和非线性输运（表面态主导），提取表面特有的三阶非互易响应。
AI.result: 发现异常巨大的三阶非互易响应，远超常规预期，该响应源于费米弧端点的奇异性；非线性输运揭示了表面特有的贡献，而线性输运仍由体态主导。
AI.conclusion: 首次明确证实了费米弧的手性特征，建立了非线性输运作为直接探测拓扑表面态的工具，并展示了可在室温下工作的、拓扑保护且表面可切换的非线性响应功能。

title: General Method for Evaluation of Stop-Bands of Periodic Structures with Symmetric Unit Cells
summary: The mirror symmetries of a periodic unit cell are exploited to decompose the standing-wave eigenproblem at the high-symmetry vertices of the Brillouin zone into four independent sub-problems on a quarter-cell, each governed by Neumann (sound-hard) or Dirichlet (sound-soft) boundary conditions. Sorting and pairing the resulting eigenfrequencies by index along each segment of the irreducible Brillouin zone boundary yields an explicit formula for the stop-band intervals without computing the full dispersion diagram. The decomposition is exact, following directly from the representation theory of the little group at each high-symmetry point. It applies to any unit cell whose material distribution is invariant under the mirrors normal to the cell faces. The method is validated on two configurations: a phononic crystal of lead cylinders in an epoxy matrix, analyzed using the plane-wave expansion, and a lattice of coupled C-shaped Helmholtz resonators, analyzed using finite-element analysis. For both systems, the reconstructed stop-band boundaries agree with the full Floquet dispersion calculation to within 1% for the lowest bands, requiring eigenvalue solutions at only three discrete wavevectors. Avoided crossings within a Brillouin zone segment can cause bands to exhibit non-monotone behavior, rendering the pairing rule approximate; the spectral conditions for this are identified. Flat bands common to both boundary-condition types are identified as bound states in the continuum.

AI.tldr: 本文利用周期性单胞的镜像对称性，将布里渊区高对称顶点处的驻波本征问题分解为四分之一胞上的四个独立子问题，分别由 Neumann 或 Dirichlet 边界条件控制。通过对不可约布里渊区边界各段上的本征频率进行排序和配对，推导出禁带区间的显式公式，无需计算完整色散图。该方法精确且适用于材料分布关于细胞面法向镜像不变的任何单胞，并在两种构型中得到验证（误差在1%以内）。
AI.motivation: 传统上计算声子晶体或超材料的禁带需要求解完整的 Floquet 色散关系，计算成本较高。本文旨在利用对称性简化该问题，仅需在三个离散波矢处求解本征值即可重构禁带边界，从而大幅降低计算量。
AI.method: 利用周期性单胞的镜像对称性，将高对称布里渊区顶点处的驻波本征问题分解为四分之一胞上的四个独立子问题，每个子问题由 Neumann 或 Dirichlet 边界条件控制。然后对不可约布里渊区边界各段上的本征频率按指标排序和配对，得到禁带区间的显式公式。
AI.result: 在铅圆柱-环氧基体声子晶体（平面波展开）和C型Helmholtz谐振器晶格（有限元分析）两种构型中，重构的禁带边界与完整 Floquet 色散计算结果在最低几条能带上的误差在1%以内，仅需三个离散波矢处的本征值解。同时识别了导致配对规则近似的避免交叉条件，以及两种边界条件共有的平带对应连续谱中的束缚态。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于对称性分解的方法能够高效、精确地预测声子晶体和超材料的禁带区间，且无需计算完整色散图，具有广泛适用性。该方法还能识别避免交叉和连续谱中的束缚态等特殊物理现象。

title: Constrained Optimization Algorithms for Orbital Optimization in Quantum Chemistry
summary: We present a modular constrained-orbital-optimization framework for quantum chemistry. The formulation separates the correlated electronic-structure solver from the orbital optimizer: the solver supplies one- and two-particle reduced density matrices, while the molecular orbitals are updated on the orthonormality-constrained Stiefel manifold with an implicit steepest-descent algorithm. Because the orbital optimizer only requires reduced density matrices, MP2, CASCI, and DMRG can be treated within the same interface. For CASCI solvers, the approach is closely related to optimal-orbital full configuration interaction and CASSCF\cite{helgaker_MulticonfigurationalSelfConsistentField_2000a}, but uses a solver-independent constrained-optimization update rather than CAS-specific orbital-rotation equations. When conventional CASSCF orbital-rotation iterations converge to higher-energy local solutions, CO-CAS can recover lower-energy stationary solutions. We also introduce a modified direct inversion in the iterative subspace procedure to accelerate macro-iteration convergence and a dynamical-weighting scheme to improve state-averaged excited-state calculations. Applications to LiF, H$_2$O, and pyrazine show that orbital optimization lowers energies relative to fixed-orbital MP2, CASCI, and DMRG references while improving convergence and potential-energy-curve smoothness.

AI.tldr: 提出一个模块化约束轨道优化框架，将相关电子结构求解器与轨道优化器分离，使用约化密度矩阵在Stiefel流形上更新轨道，可统一处理MP2、CASCI、DMRG等方法，并通过改进的迭代过程和动态加权方案提升收敛性和能量平滑性。
AI.motivation: 现有CASSCF方法使用特定于CAS的轨道旋转方程，容易收敛到高能局部解，且不同电子结构方法（MP2、CASCI、DMRG）缺乏统一的轨道优化接口。
AI.method: 提出CO-CAS框架：1）将求解器与轨道优化器分离，求解器提供1-RDM和2-RDM，轨道在Stiefel流形上用隐式最速下降算法更新；2）引入改进的DIIS加速宏观迭代收敛；3）提出动态加权方案改进态平均激发态计算。
AI.result: 在LiF、H₂O和吡嗪分子上的应用表明，与固定轨道MP2、CASCI、DMRG参考相比，CO-CAS框架能获得更低能量、更好的收敛性和更平滑的势能曲线。当传统CASSCF收敛到高能局部解时，CO-CAS可恢复更低能量的驻点解。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了求解器无关的约束轨道优化，统一了不同电子结构方法的轨道优化接口，提高了能量收敛质量和势能曲线平滑度。

title: High-Order Simulation of Particle-Laden Flows in Moving Domains Using Coupled ALE and Sliding Mesh Approaches
summary: In practical applications, compressible particle-laden flows in moving geometries involve complex, non-linear, and multi-scale inter-actions with turbulent structures. Resolving these dynamics numerically requires careful algorithmic treatment to accurately predict particle trajectories. This work presents a high-fidelity Euler-Lagrange framework that couples a high-order discontinuous Galerkin spectral element method for the continuous phase with a Lagrangian point-particle tracking scheme. To manage moving and deforming domains, the framework integrates two distinct mesh movement strategies: the arbitrary Lagrangian-Eulerian method for general mesh deformations such as time-resolved particle-induced surface deformations and its special interface case, the sliding mesh approach, uniquely suited for rigid rotational or translational movements. A primary focus is placed on tightly coupling the arbitrary Lagrangian-Eulerian formulation into the temporal evolution step by utilizing radial basis function morphing to capture the non-linear feedback loop between evolving surface topologies and the continuous phase. Concurrently, the framework ensures time- and high-order accurate coupling of the mesh movement algorithms with the dispersed phase. In particular, the proposed algorithm resolves the sliding mesh tracking problem by enforcing strict spatial and temporal accuracy as Lagrangian particles cross non-conforming grid interfaces between adjacent moving zones. The algorithms are rigorously validated against multiple benchmarks and subsequently applied to two challenging compressor rotor applications: the first focusing on solid-particle erosion, and the second featuring an upstream cylindrical wake generator.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高保真欧拉-拉格朗日框架，结合高阶间断伽辽金谱元法与拉格朗日点粒子追踪，集成任意拉格朗日-欧拉方法和滑移网格策略，用于模拟可压缩颗粒负载流在运动几何中的复杂动力学，并通过压缩机转子应用验证。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中，可压缩颗粒负载流在运动几何中涉及复杂、非线性和多尺度的湍流相互作用，数值求解需要精确的算法处理来预测粒子轨迹，现有方法在处理移动变形域与颗粒耦合时存在精度不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用高阶间断伽辽金谱元法（DGSEM）求解连续相，结合拉格朗日点粒子追踪方案；集成任意拉格朗日-欧拉（ALE）方法处理一般网格变形，滑移网格方法处理刚性旋转/平移；利用径向基函数（RBF）变形技术捕捉表面拓扑演化与连续相的非线性反馈；确保网格运动算法与离散相在时间和高阶精度上的紧耦合，解决滑移网格中粒子跨越非一致网格界面的时空精度问题。
AI.result: 通过多个基准测试进行严格验证，并成功应用于两个具有挑战性的压缩机转子场景：固体颗粒侵蚀和上游圆柱尾流发生器。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够高精度地模拟可压缩颗粒负载流在运动复杂几何中的多尺度相互作用，为压缩机等工业应用中的颗粒流动问题提供了可靠的数值工具。

authors: Gilberto A. de la Peña Muñoz
title: Emergent Antiphase Stacking in a Transient Charge Density Wave
summary: Photoexcitation can induce novel states in materials that are inaccessible in equilibrium, a recent example being the light-induced charge density wave (CDW) observed in $\text{LaTe}_3$. Here, we investigate this transient CDW using infrared-pump x-ray-probe scattering at a free-electron laser, with high momentum and time resolution. We find that the transient CDW Bragg peak is broad in reciprocal space, indicating a highly disordered state. The ordering wavevector of the transient state is different from the equilibrium orders that develop in this class of materials - the transient peak appears near (2/7, 0, 0) reciprocal lattice units, whereas the equilibrium $a$ order and $c$ order occur at $\approx (5/7, 0, 0)$ and $(0, 0, 2/7)$, respectively. The transient CDW is therefore distinct from the equilibrium $a$ order, differing in the relative phase of the CDW displacement between the two equivalent nearly-square Te-Te nets in the conventional unit cell. Our work highlights how photoexcitation can access states with no equilibrium analog, and how x-ray scattering can provide microscopic insight into such elusive phases.

AI.tldr: 本文利用红外泵浦- X射线探针散射技术，在自由电子激光器上研究了LaTe₃中光诱导的瞬态电荷密度波（CDW），发现该瞬态CDW在倒易空间中展宽，表明高度无序；其有序波矢为(2/7,0,0)，与平衡态的a序(~5/7,0,0)和c序(0,0,2/7)均不同，揭示了一种无平衡态对应的新相。
AI.motivation: 探索光激发能否诱导出平衡态无法访问的新奇量子态，并利用高动量/时间分辨的X射线散射技术揭示瞬态电荷密度波（CDW）的微观结构特性。
AI.method: 采用红外泵浦（infrared-pump）与X射线探针散射（X-ray-probe scattering）相结合的技术，在自由电子激光器上对LaTe₃进行时间分辨测量，分析瞬态CDW的布拉格峰展宽、波矢位置及相行为。
AI.result: 瞬态CDW布拉格峰在倒易空间中展宽，表明高度无序；其有序波矢位于(2/7,0,0)，与平衡态的a序(~5/7,0,0)和c序(0,0,2/7)皆不同；该瞬态CDW与平衡a序的区别在于两个近乎正方形的Te-Te网中CDW位移的相对相位不同。
AI.conclusion: 光激发能够诱导出平衡态中不存在的新奇有序态，瞬态CDW在波矢和相对相位上与平衡态完全不同，X射线散射为理解这种难以捉摸的亚稳态相提供了微观层面的洞察。

title: Work Extraction via Backward Motion in Optimal Closed-Loop Stochastic Control
summary: We experimentally realize finite-time feedback control in an overdamped colloidal system using real-time optical tweezers with in situ reinforcement learning (RL). By varying the protocol duration tf for displacing the optical trap between prescribed positions, the optimal strategies identified by RL reveal a crossover from deterministic dragging toward the target to feedback-assisted exploitation of thermal fluctuations, reducing and eventually overcoming the energetic cost. The resulting policies agree quantitatively with the exact optimal closed-loop solution. By extending the approach to spatially localized external forcing, we further show that RL can identify optimal feedback strategies in heterogeneous stochastic environments where direct analytical control design is challenging.

AI.tldr: 利用光镊和在线强化学习，实验实现了过阻尼胶体系统中的有限时间反馈控制。RL识别的最优策略揭示了从确定性拖拽到利用热涨落的反馈辅助的交叉，降低了能量成本，并成功应用于异质随机环境。
AI.motivation: 探索有限时间反馈控制在过阻尼胶体系统中的实验实现，并验证强化学习能否在异质随机环境中识别出超越传统分析设计能力的最优反馈策略。
AI.method: 采用实时光镊结合在线强化学习(RL)，通过改变光阱位移的协议持续时间tf，在过阻尼胶体系统中实现有限时间反馈控制，并将RL策略与精确最优闭环解进行定量比较。
AI.result: RL识别的最优策略显示出从确定性拖拽到反馈辅助利用热涨落的交叉，降低了并最终克服了能量成本；策略与精确最优闭环解定量一致；RL能在异质环境中找到最优反馈策略。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习可以有效识别过阻尼胶体系统中的最优反馈控制策略，在异质随机环境中具有超越传统分析方法的优势，为微观热力学系统中的智能控制提供了新途径。

title: Tunable Superconductivity in 1313-La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$: Suppressed under Compression and Possible $s^{\pm}$ Pairing under Tension
summary: Motivated by recent progress in the 1313-La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ nickelate thin films (Nie et al., Nature {\bf 652}, 628 (2026)), we systematically investigate the effects of both compressive and tensile strain in this system. Self-doping effects between the single-layer (SL) and trilayer (TL) blocks are observed in our studies in both cases, but are most pronounced under tensile strain. We find that superconductivity is unlikely to emerge in the 1313 film on the LSAO substrate even with further hole doping. Remarkably, within the random-phase approximation, under {\it tensile} strain, a robust $s^{\pm}$-wave pairing state emerges in the TL subsystem with sign changes between the small electron-like $σ$ pocket at the $Γ$ point and the small hole-like $γ$ pocket at the M point. These pockets are connected by a wave vector close to $(π,π)$. Our calculations also suggest that superconductivity in 1313-LNO requires an optimally sized $γ$ pocket, because an oversized $γ$ pocket suppresses pairing formation. Overall, our results predict strain-dependent electronic reconstruction in 1313-La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ and provide guiding principles for engineering superconductivity under ambient pressure conditions.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过理论计算研究了应变对1313-La₃Ni₂O₇薄膜超导性的影响，发现拉伸应变下TL子系统会出现s±波配对态，且超导需要适中大小的γ口袋，为环境压力下工程化超导性提供了指导原则。
AI.motivation: 受1313-La₃Ni₂O₇镍酸盐薄膜最新实验进展启发，系统研究压缩和拉伸应变对该系统的影响，探索应变如何调控超导性。
AI.method: 采用随机相位近似（RPA）方法，系统分析不同应变条件下SL和TL块体间的自掺杂效应，以及配对态的形成机制。
AI.result: 拉伸应变下TL子系统中出现稳健的s±波配对态，Γ点的小电子型σ口袋与M点的小空穴型γ口袋之间符号反转，两者由接近(π,π)的波矢连接；超导需要适当大小的γ口袋。
AI.conclusion: 应变能显著改变1313-LNO的电子结构，调控超导性；预测了应变依赖的电子重构，为环境压力下工程化超导提供了指导原则。

title: Anomalous Pairing Currents and a Second Topological Edge Channel in Bosonic Lattices
summary: We show that bosonic pairing opens a second chiral current channel on a 2D kagome lattice, absent from any particle-conserving model. From the continuity equation, we derive both a hopping current and an anomalous pairing current on the lattice, and predict chiral circulation in bulk-gapped phases with integer para-unitary Chern numbers, as well as a phase-sensitive leakage ratio, $Λ_{\cal I}$, for the pairing current around a defect. This ratio can be tuned from confined to strongly anomalous regimes at fixed topology. The two channels differ microscopically: the hopping current is sourced by the on-bond single-particle coherence, whereas the pairing current is sourced by the off-site anomalous coherence, whose spatial range is governed by the BdG pairing gap rather than by the single-particle gap. This separation produces distinct defect-induced signatures in real space, identifies a regime in which bulk topology and anomalous edge response coexist with no analogue in particle-conserving matter, and is directly testable in driven photonic lattices and superconducting-circuit arrays.

AI.tldr: 本文证明在二维kagome晶格上，玻色配对打开了第二个手征电流通道，这在任何粒子数守恒模型中都不存在。通过连续性方程推导了格点上的跳跃电流和反常配对电流，预测了具有整数para-unitary陈数的体有隙相中的手征循环，以及缺陷周围配对电流的相位敏感泄漏比Λ_ℐ。两个通道在微观上不同：跳跃电流由键上单粒子相干性驱动，而配对电流由离位反常相干性驱动，其空间范围由BdG配对能隙而非单粒子能隙决定。这种分离产生实空间中独特的缺陷诱导信号，识别了一个体拓扑与反常边缘响应共存的区域，在粒子数守恒物质中没有类似物，并可直接在驱动光子晶格和超导电路阵列中检验。
AI.motivation: 探索玻色配对系统中超越粒子数守恒模型的新奇拓扑现象，特别是第二个手征电流通道的存在及其物理起源。
AI.method: 在二维kagome格点上构建包含玻色配对的模型，利用连续性方程推导跳跃电流和配对电流，通过para-unitary陈数表征拓扑性质，并分析缺陷周围的电流分布。
AI.result: 发现了由玻色配对导致的第二手征电流通道；定义了相位敏感的泄漏比Λ_ℐ；揭示了配对电流的空间范围由BdG配对能隙控制；发现了体拓扑与反常边缘响应共存的参数区域。
AI.conclusion: 玻色配对系统可实现粒子数守恒系统中不存在的独特拓扑输运行为，为在驱动光子晶格和超导电路阵列中实现和探测这类新物理提供了理论指导。

title: Dislocation-templated antiferromagnetic domains in epitaxial NiO
summary: Controlling antiferromagnetic domains is essential for spintronics, yet deterministic manipulation remains challenging due to their lack of net magnetization. Here, we utilize scanning electron microscopy electron channeling contrast imaging (ECCI) to demonstrate a robust structural memory effect in epitaxial NiO/MgO(001), where antiferromagnetic twin-domain walls (DWs) are deterministically pinned at the nanoscale by interface dislocation networks. Thermal cycling across the Neel temperature reveals that while DW contrast completely vanishes in the paramagnetic phase, the features re-emerge at identical spatial locations upon cooling. Diffraction-vector-dependent ECCI demonstrates that domain contrast stems from localized rhombohedral magnetostrictive strain fields. By tracking a film thickness series from 23 to 60 nm, we resolve an explicit transition in oxide relaxation mechanics. A primary slip system initiates strain relaxation via interface misfit dislocations (MDs) tracking along <100>. At greater thicknesses, rising critical strain prompts threading segments to cross-slip onto secondary or higher-index planes, depositing a wavy network of zig-zag MD lines deviated toward <110>. Quantitative image analysis reveals that DW area fractions directly track the local density and spatial configuration of the evolving MD networks, providing a framework for defect-engineering antiferromagnetic textures using one-dimensional defects.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了NiO/MgO(001)外延薄膜中反铁磁孪晶畴壁被界面位错网络确定性钉扎的机制，利用ECCI成像揭示了磁致伸缩应变场与位错网络的关联，并通过厚度系列实验建立了位错网络演化与反铁磁畴壁钉扎的定量关系。
AI.motivation: 反铁磁材料在自旋电子学中具有重要应用，但因其净磁化强度为零，难以实现确定性操控。本文旨在通过缺陷工程实现反铁磁畴壁的确定性钉扎。
AI.method: 利用扫描电子显微镜电子通道衬度成像（ECCI）技术，结合衍射矢量分析和热循环实验，研究了NiO/MgO(001)外延薄膜中反铁磁畴壁与界面位错网络的相互作用。
AI.result: 发现反铁磁畴壁被界面位错网络确定性钉扎，具有结构记忆效应；通过厚度系列（23-60 nm）实验，揭示了位错网络从沿<100>方向的初级滑移系统到沿<110>方向的锯齿状网络的演化过程，并建立了畴壁面积分数与位错网络密度和空间构型的定量关系。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提供了一种利用一维缺陷（位错网络）工程化反铁磁畴结构的框架，为反铁磁自旋电子学中畴壁的确定性操控提供了新思路。

title: Photoinduced enhancement of chemical shift sensitivity to local vibrations
summary: The advent of novel free-electron laser sources enabling time-resolved x-ray photoelectron spectroscopy (tr-XPS) provides a unique opportunity to monitor local chemical environments in real time by measuring sub-eV shifts in core-electron binding energies. These shifts reflect the interplay between electronic excitation and nuclear motion, an interplay that remains largely unexplored. In our combined theoretical and experimental study of fluoropyridine (C$_5$H$_4$FN), we investigate this link by monitoring the evolving chemical environment at the N and F atomic sites as the photoexcited $S_1$ state relaxes to the ground state via a conical intersection. We find that the F site responds primarily to vibrational relaxation, showing minimal sensitivity to the electronic excited state. In contrast, excitation to $S_1$ induces a measurable energy shift at the N site and significantly enhances its sensitivity to local vibrations within the ring. This behavior arises from a photoinduced redistribution of charge, which also increases the Coulomb interaction between the 1s electron at the N atom and the atomic partial charge at an adjacent C atom. This insight opens new avenues for exploring ultrafast dynamics and conical intersection pathways in more complex systems, from photostable DNA bases to light-harvesting materials.

AI.tldr: 本文结合理论和实验，利用时间分辨X射线光电子能谱（tr-XPS）研究氟吡啶（C5H4FN）分子在光激发S1态通过圆锥交叉弛豫回基态过程中，N和F原子位点局域化学环境的实时演化。发现F位点主要响应振动弛豫，对电子激发不敏感；而N位点对S1激发有明显能量位移，对环内局部振动的敏感性显著增强，这源于光致电荷重新分布增强了N的1s电子与相邻C原子部分电荷之间的库仑相互作用。
AI.motivation: 探索自由电子激光实现的时间分辨X射线光电子能谱（tr-XPS）能否实时监测光激发过程中局域化学环境的变化，揭示电子激发与核运动之间尚未被充分理解的相互作用。
AI.method: 结合理论计算与时间分辨X射线光电子能谱实验，以氟吡啶为模型分子，追踪光激发S1态通过圆锥交叉回到基态过程中，N和F原子位点核电子结合能的亚电子伏特级位移。
AI.result: F位点对电子激发不敏感，主要反映振动弛豫；N位点对S1激发有明显的能量位移，且对环内局部振动的敏感性显著增强，其原因在于光致电荷重新分布增强了N的1s电子与相邻C原子上部分电荷之间的库仑相互作用。
AI.conclusion: 这一发现为利用tr-XPS探索更复杂体系（如光稳定DNA碱基、光捕获材料等）中的超快动力学和圆锥交叉路径开辟了新途径。

title: Singular Vector Finite Element Basis Functions for Tetrahedra in Complex Electromagnetic Geometries
summary: Electromagnetic finite element method (FEM) implementations using traditional basis functions struggle to accurately represent field behavior near singular features such as conducting wedges. To combat this, specialized singular basis functions have been introduced to directly model the singular fields in these regions, leading to substantially improved performance. While these efforts have been pursued extensively in 2D, few functions have been developed for 3D elements. In this work, we develop basis functions for this in tetrahedra. Unlike prior functions, these basis functions are additive, meaning they are included alongside the standard vector basis functions to achieve more robust performance. Further, these functions are designed to be adaptable to tetrahedra touching several unique singular features by using combinations of basis functions singular with respect to each node and edge in the element, making them applicable to highly complex geometries. Higher-order interpolatory versions of the basis functions for modeling singular behavior with greater accuracy are also provided. These basis functions lead to substantial improvements in accuracy relative to the standard basis functions, and allow otherwise expensive simulations to be performed at far lower costs. As an application example, we perform simulations to extract critical quantities for designing superconducting qubits that significantly depend on the behavior of singular fields. In Ansys HFSS, this took 21.27 hours and a peak memory usage of 6.23 TB with 800 processors available, while using our singular basis functions achieved comparable results in 196 seconds while using 27.24 GB of memory and only 16 processors. Due to these benefits, our singular basis functions could be applied to enable design optimization of electromagnetic geometries with dominantly singular behavior, such as superconducting qubits.

AI.tldr: 本文针对电磁有限元法中传统基函数难以准确表示奇异场（如导电平面的楔形边缘）的问题，提出了适用于四面体单元的可加性奇异基函数。该函数可与标准矢量基函数结合使用，支持针对节点和边的奇异行为建模，并提供高阶插值版本。在超导量子比特设计仿真中，该方法相比Ansys HFSS（800核、6.23 TB内存、21.27小时）仅需16核、27.24 GB内存和196秒即可获得可比结果，显著降低了计算成本。
AI.motivation: 电磁有限元法在处理导电楔形等奇异特征附近的场时，传统基函数精度不足，现有针对2D元素的奇异基函数研究较多，但3D四面体元素中缺乏有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 开发了可加性奇异基函数，与标准矢量基函数共同使用；函数针对四面体的节点和边分别设计奇异模式，可组合适应复杂几何；提供了高阶插值版本以提高精度。
AI.result: 在超导量子比特仿真中，该方法仅用16个处理器、27.24 GB内存、196秒即可达到与Ansys HFSS（800核、6.23 TB内存、21.27小时）相当的精度，计算资源消耗大幅降低。
AI.conclusion: 提出的四面体奇异基函数能够高效准确地处理电磁奇异场问题，特别适用于超导量子比特等以奇异行为主导的电磁几何设计优化。

title: Flat-Band Stoner Instability and Peierls-Phase Origin of the Transdimensional Anomalous Hall Effect in Rhombohedral Graphite
summary: A ``transdimensional'' anomalous Hall effect (TDAHE), where both in-plane ($\Bpar$) and out-of-plane magnetic fields produce hysteretic Hall signals, was recently observed in nine-layer rhombohedral graphite~\cite{Li2026Nature}. We present a microscopic theory attributing the TDAHE to a flat-band Stoner instability coupled to Peierls-phase gap modulation. The flat-band density of states satisfies the Stoner criterion $Uρ(\varepsilon_F) > 1$~\cite{Bultinck2020}, driving a spin-valley-locked ferromagnet whose valley polarization $η$ breaks time-reversal symmetry and generates an intrinsic anomalous Hall conductivity (AHC). The orbital $g$-factor $g_{\mathrm{orb}} = e d_0 v_F (N{-}1)/2 \propto (N{-}1)$ then lets $\Bpar$ modulate the gap, producing the transdimensional response $\propto η$. A self-consistent $2N$-band Hartree-Fock calculation yields complete valley polarization ($η\to 1$) below a mean-field transition $T_c^{\mathrm{MF}} \approx 2.2$~K, reduced by 2D-Ising critical fluctuations to the experimental $T_c \approx 1.6$~K, with $R_{xy} \approx 1.5$~k$Ω$. Because both Hall responses are carried by one order parameter $η$, they share a single $T_c$, as observed; $T_c$ is governed by the Stoner product $Uρ$ and is insensitive to the intervalley exchange, which only gates whether the valley-polarized phase forms, so the exchange strength is not a fitted parameter. Beyond reproducing $R_{xy}$, $T_c$, and the phase window, the theory predicts a sharp onset of valley polarization between $N = 7$ and $N = 9$, a symmetry selection rule fixing the crescent Fermi surface to the $m{=}1$ nematic channel, and a transdimensional-to-conventional Hall ratio $\sigmaPHE/\sigmaAHE^{\mathrm{tot}} = g_{\mathrm{orb}}\Bpar/m$ independent of $η$ and $U$. The $Z$-independence of the intrinsic AHC is verified within dynamical mean-field theory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出微观理论，将九层菱方石墨中观测到的“跨维度反常霍尔效应”（TDAHE）归因于平带Stoner不稳定性与Peierls相位调制的耦合，通过自洽Hartree-Fock计算和临界涨落分析，成功复现了实验中的霍尔电阻、转变温度等关键现象，并作出多项可检验预测。
AI.motivation: 解释九层菱方石墨中同时由面内和面外磁场产生滞后霍尔信号的反常霍尔效应（TDAHE）的微观物理机制。
AI.method: 发展了基于平带Stoner不稳定性与Peierls相位调制耦合的微观理论，采用自洽2N能带Hartree-Fock计算，并结合二维Ising临界涨落修正，以及动力学平均场理论（DMFT）验证。
AI.result: 获得完全谷极化（η→1）状态，均场转变温度T_c^MF≈2.2K，经临界涨落修正后降至实验值T_c≈1.6K；复现霍尔电阻R_xy≈1.5kΩ；预测谷极化在N=7到N=9之间突然出现、费米面呈m=1向列通道对称性、跨维度与传统霍尔效应比值等可检验结果。
AI.conclusion: TDAHE源自同一序参量η，因此面内和面外磁场响应的T_c相同；转变温度由Stoner乘积Uρ主导，无需拟合交换相互作用强度；理论还预测了层数依赖的陡峭转变和对称性选择规则等新现象。

title: First-order phase transitions in the three-dimensional Blume-Capel ferromagnet
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures, 1 table, submitted to Physica A
summary: We investigate first-order phase transitions in the three-dimensional Blume-Capel ferromagnet on the simple cubic lattice by combining multicanonical simulations with two-parameter Wang-Landau sampling. The generalized-ensemble approach enables a detailed characterization of the coexistence region over a broad range of temperatures and crystal-field couplings, extending from the vicinity of the tricritical point deep into the first-order regime. We analyze the finite-size scaling behavior of thermodynamic observables, with particular emphasis on the energy probability density function, free-energy barriers, and interfacial properties. The evolution of the double-peaked energy distributions reveals a gradual crossover from weak to strong first-order behavior as the temperature is lowered. From the scaling of the free-energy barrier we determine the interface tension along the coexistence line and characterize its approach to the tricritical region through its vanishing behavior. In parallel, a field-mixing analysis based on the joint density of states obtained from two-parameter Wang-Landau simulations is employed to locate first-order transition points and probe tricritical behavior. While this approach has been highly successful in two-dimensional realizations of the Blume-Capel model, we find that in three dimensions its practical implementation becomes increasingly sensitive in the vicinity of the tricritical region, where the shallow structure of the relevant scaling variable distribution limits the ability to resolve coexistence conditions for the system sizes currently accessible. These results delineate the range of applicability of the method in three dimensions and provide a consistent picture of the first-order regime of the model.

AI.tldr: 本文结合多正则模拟与双参数Wang-Landau采样，系统研究了三维简单立方晶格上Blume-Capel铁磁体的一级相变，分析了共存区的有限尺寸标度行为、自由能势垒和界面张力，并探讨了场混合分析方法在三维系统中的适用性范围。
AI.motivation: 系统刻画三维Blume-Capel模型从三临界点延伸到深一级相变区的共存区特征，检验场混合分析法在三维系统中的实用性与局限性。
AI.method: 采用多正则模拟结合双参数Wang-Landau采样这一广义系综方法，通过有限尺寸标度分析能量概率密度函数、自由能势垒和界面性质；同时利用联合态密度进行场混合分析定位一级相变点。
AI.result: 双峰能量分布显示随温度降低存在从弱一级到强一级的渐变交叉；从自由能势垒标度确定了共存线上的界面张力及其在三临界区附近的消失行为；场混合分析在三维中于三临界区附近敏感性增大，分辨能力受限。
AI.conclusion: 研究界定了场混合分析法在三维系统中的适用范围，提供了该模型一级相变区的一致图像，揭示了三维与二维实现中该方法有效性的差异。

title: Distinguishing Majorana zero modes from trivial defect states on the surface of the iron-based superconductor Fe(Te,Se)
summary: Majorana zero modes, which obey non-Abelian exchange statistics, are promising candidates for topological quantum computation due to their robustness against environmental perturbations. The iron-based superconductor Fe(Te,Se) has been identified as an intrinsic topological superconductor, possibly hosting Majorana zero modes. In this paper, we report the observation of near-zero-energy localized states at multiple structural defects on the Fe(Te,Se) surface, which could be misidentified as Majorana zero modes without additional verification. By using spin-polarized scanning tunneling spectroscopy, we demonstrate that the near-zero-energy localized states on step edges and line defects originate from topologically trivial Yu-Shiba-Rusinov states. In addition, zero-energy bound states are also observed for regions without surface defects. A combined spatial and magnetic field dependent analysis of the spin-resolved tunneling spectra in these regions reveals that this type of zero-energy states cannot be attributed to the presence of Majorana bound states. These findings emphasize the importance of spin-dependent studies of low-energy states for pursuing Majorana zero modes.

AI.tldr: 本文通过自旋极化扫描隧道谱学研究了Fe(Te,Se)表面的近零能局域态，发现台阶边缘和线缺陷处的零能态源于拓扑平庸的Yu-Shiba-Rusinov态，而非Majorana零模；此外，无缺陷区域的零能束缚态也无法归因于Majorana束缚态。研究强调了自旋分辨测量在识别Majorana零模中的重要性。
AI.motivation: 由于Fe(Te,Se)被认定为本征拓扑超导体可能承载Majorana零模，但表面多种结构缺陷产生的近零能态容易被误认，因此需要更严格的实验手段加以区分和验证。
AI.method: 采用自旋极化扫描隧道谱学技术，结合空间分布和磁场依赖分析，对Fe(Te,Se)表面不同类型缺陷处的自旋分辨隧穿谱进行系统研究。
AI.result: 台阶边缘和线缺陷处的近零能局域态来自拓扑平庸的Yu-Shiba-Rusinov态；无缺陷区域观测到的零能束缚态也无法归因于Majorana束缚态。
AI.conclusion: 自旋依赖的研究对于正确识别和追寻Majorana零模至关重要，仅靠零能态观测不足以确认Majorana零模的存在。

title: Beyond the interface: Persistent Hopping Transport and Frequency Dispersion in Strong-inversion Cryogenic MOSFETs
summary: Cryogenic complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor (cryo-CMOS) technology is essential for quantum computing interfaces, which require precise modeling of dynamic device behavior. The output impedance of MOS field-effect transistors (MOSFETs) is frequency dependent, which has been conventionally attributed to extrinsic parasitics. Here, we report an intrinsic frequency dispersion in the channel impedance of cryogenic MOSFETs that persists deep into the strong-inversion region. Through a Cole-Cole analysis, we characterize this dispersion as a depressed semicircle in the impedance plane and attribute its behavior to variable-range hopping through band-tail localized states. Unlike conventional models where band-tail states are confined to the oxide interface, we demonstrate that in MOSFETs with high channel doping the band-tail states are induced by ionized impurities and distributed throughout the depletion region. Our paradigm accounts for frequency dispersion under strong inversion. This work demonstrates that ionized-impurities-induced hopping governs the dynamic response of cryo-MOSFETs channel impedance even when drift conduction dominates, offering critical insights for accurate small-signal modeling and high-frequency cryo-CMOS circuit design.

AI.tldr: 该论文报告了低温MOSFET中一种本征频率色散现象，该现象源于通过电离杂质诱导的带尾局域态进行的变程跳跃，即使在强反型区漂移传导占主导时也存在，对量子计算接口的低温CMOS建模至关重要。
AI.motivation: 量子计算接口需要精确的低温CMOS器件动态行为建模，而传统模型将MOSFET输出阻抗的频率依赖性归因于外部寄生效应，未能解释强反型区下的本征频率色散现象。
AI.method: 采用Cole-Cole分析（阻抗平面中的凹陷半圆表征），结合变程跳跃模型，并通过高沟道掺杂MOSFET中电离杂质诱导的带尾态分布理论来解释实验观测。
AI.result: 发现低温MOSFET在强反型区存在本征频率色散，表现为阻抗平面的凹陷半圆；证明该色散源于耗尽区中由电离杂质诱导的带尾局域态导致的变程跳跃。
AI.conclusion: 电离杂质诱导的跳跃机制即使在漂移传导主导时仍控制着低温MOSFET沟道阻抗的动态响应，为精确的小信号建模和高频低温CMOS电路设计提供了关键见解。

title: Robust Spin Splitting and Strain-Controlled Optical Response in Monolayer CrC2N4 for Valleytronic and Optoelectronic Applications
summary: Monolayer CrC2N4 recently emerged as a promising two-dimensional semiconductor, yet its spin-orbit-coupled (SOC) physics and strain-tunable optical response remained largely unexplored. Here, we investigated the electronic, valley, charge-transfer, and optical properties of pristine and biaxially strained monolayer CrC2N4 using first-principles calculations. The monolayer exhibited a direct band gap at the K/K' valleys. SOC produced valley contrasting out-of-plane spin polarization, yielding a moderate valence band spin splitting of 51.9 meV and a small conduction band spin splitting of 1.7 meV. Orbital-resolved analysis showed that the edge states were mainly governed by Cr-d and N-p hybridization, while Bader analysis indicated polar-covalent bonding through charge transfer toward N atoms. Biaxial strain in the range of -4% to +4% tuned the band gap from 1.987 to 1.421 eV and drove an indirect-to-direct gap transition near -1% strain. Tensile strain enhanced the Berry curvature and red-shifted the optical response toward the visible-near-infrared region. These results suggested monolayer CrC2N4 as a promising platform for strain-engineered valleytronic and optoelectronic device applications.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，系统研究了单层CrC2N4在自旋-轨道耦合和双轴应变下的电子、谷、电荷转移和光学性质，发现其在-4%至+4%应变范围内带隙可调（1.987-1.421 eV），并表现出谷对比自旋极化和可调光学响应，表明其在应变工程谷电子学和光电器件中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 单层CrC2N4作为一种新兴的二维半导体，其自旋-轨道耦合物理和应变可调的光学响应尚未得到充分探索，该研究旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算，对原始和双轴应变下的单层CrC2N4进行电子结构、谷特性、电荷转移和光学性质分析，包括轨道分辨分析、Bader分析和Berry曲率计算。
AI.result: (1) 单层CrC2N4在K/K'谷具有直接带隙；(2) SOC产生谷对比面外自旋极化，价带自旋分裂51.9 meV，导带分裂1.7 meV；(3) 边缘态主要由Cr-d和N-p杂化主导，存在极性共价键和向N原子的电荷转移；(4) -4%至+4%双轴应变将带隙从1.987 eV调至1.421 eV，在-1%应变附近发生间接-直接带隙转变；(5) 拉伸应变增强Berry曲率，使光学响应红移至可见-近红外区域。
AI.conclusion: 单层CrC2N4是应变工程谷电子学和光电器件应用的有前景平台。

title: Thermodynamically consistent modeling of ion exchange membranes in multi-ionic environments
summary: Ion exchange membranes are useful for a wide range of applications, including water desalination, fuel cells, and aqueous batteries. Accordingly, a variety of models for ion exchange membranes has been proposed, each emphasizing different aspects that govern their static and dynamic properties.
